scenes.description: 一名男性在室内专注使用笔记本电脑工作，环境安静简洁，光线柔和，他操作键盘并偶尔抬头查看屏幕，最后用手指指向屏幕某处，似乎在讲解内容。
scenes.video_prompt: A focused male in a deep blue shirt sits at a minimalist wooden desk indoors, typing on a laptop with calm precision. Soft natural light filters through a nearby window, illuminating a tidy workspace with a pen holder and folders. The camera starts with a medium close-up, slowly zooming in to highlight his concentrated facial expression. His fingers move swiftly across the keyboard, then pause as he raises his right hand to point at the screen. Maintain warm tones, shallow depth of field, and a serene atmosphere. Shot on a stabilized gimbal with smooth focus transitions.

style_elements.characters: Male, early 30s, neat hair, wearing a dark blue shirt, focused expression
style_elements.environment: Indoor home office, minimalist design, light-colored walls, wooden desk, soft daylight
style_elements.visual_style: Warm, natural lighting; clean and professional aesthetic; shallow depth of field
style_elements.camera_movement: Slow push-in from medium shot to close-up; subtle zoom to emphasize interaction

scenes.description: 音频切换为卡通风格故事叙述：拖拉机陷入泥潭，角色们焦急讨论如何脱困，小兔子和小绵羊尝试帮忙但失败，气氛紧张又带点幽默。
scenes.video_prompt: Animated countryside scene with anthropomorphic animals: a tractor sinks into thick mud. A worried bear driver leans out, shouting for help. A cheerful rabbit hops forward offering to push, followed by a timid lamb. They struggle against the sludge as wheels spin uselessly. Mud splashes comically onto the bear’s face, ruining his hairstyle. The tone is playful yet tense. Use bright cartoon colors, exaggerated expressions, and dynamic angles. Camera pans between characters during dialogue, with low-angle shots emphasizing the stuck vehicle. Render in 2D animation style with soft shading and expressive motion lines.

style_elements.characters: Anthropomorphic bear, rabbit, and sheep; expressive cartoon features; colorful clothing
style_elements.environment: Rural dirt road with deep mud puddle; overcast sky; distant barn visible
style_elements.visual_style: Bright 2D cartoon style; exaggerated physics; comedic timing and visual gags
style_elements.camera_movement: Dynamic panning and tracking shots; close-ups on facial reactions; low angles on vehicle

scenes.description: 小狐狸出现，提出清理泥浆的建议，大家虽疲惫但仍保持希望，随后他找到工具箱，宣布有了新办法，引发期待。
scenes.video_prompt: The fox character arrives with a determined look, surveying the muddy situation. He suggests clearing the sludge, met with groans due to exhaustion. Close-up on each animal’s tired face before the fox suddenly remembers his invention. Cut to him searching frantically off-screen, then triumphantly pulling out a toolbox. Bright music swells as he unveils a makeshift vacuum cleaner. Maintain vibrant animation style with emotional close-ups and energetic pacing. Use over-the-shoulder shots during dialogue and quick cuts during the search sequence to build suspense.

style_elements.characters: Inventive fox character with goggles and tool belt; optimistic demeanor
style_elements.environment: Muddy outdoor trail; scattered tools; dramatic cloud lighting
style_elements.visual_style: Expressive 2D animation; high emotional contrast; comic timing
style_elements.camera_movement: Over-the-shoulder shots; quick cuts; dramatic reveals with zoom-ins

scenes.description: 小狐狸展示自制吸尘器，连接拖拉机电池供电，开始吸取泥浆，动物们协作配合，场面逐渐转为积极乐观。
scenes.video_prompt: Close-up on the fox assembling a quirky vacuum from spare parts. He connects wires to the tractor’s battery—sparks fly briefly. The machine roars to life with a comical suction sound. Animals cheer as mud gets slurped up rapidly. The rabbit guides the hose while the bear monitors progress. Dynamic camera movements follow flying debris and swirling mud. Lighting shifts from gloomy to brighter tones as hope returns. Emphasize teamwork with group shots and synchronized actions. Animated textures show realistic mud dynamics against stylized characters.

style_elements.characters: Team of animated animals working together; cooperative gestures; joyful expressions
style_elements.environment: Mud-covered field transforming as terrain clears; mechanical contraption central
style_elements.visual_style: Stylized 2D animation with physical comedy; exaggerated sound effects
style_elements.camera_movement: Tracking shots along suction flow; rotating group shots; fast-paced editing

scenes.description: 泥浆被清除后，小熊推动拖拉机成功脱困，车辆缓缓驶出，动物们欢呼庆祝，情绪达到高潮。
scenes.video_prompt: With the mud cleared, the bear braces himself and pushes the rear wheel. The tractor creaks, then lurches forward—success! Wheels grip solid ground as it rolls free. Wide celebratory shot shows all animals jumping and hugging. The fox raises his arms in victory, the rabbit dances, and the sheep bleats joyfully. Camera circles the group in a sweeping orbital motion, capturing their elation. Warm golden sunlight breaks through clouds, symbolizing triumph. Maintain animated expressiveness with bouncy motions and vivid color grading.

style_elements.characters: Joyful animal ensemble; energetic body language; triumphant poses
style_elements.environment: Cleared path after mud removal; sun breaking through clouds
style_elements.visual_style: Lively 2D animation; radiant lighting; emotional payoff visuals
style_elements.camera_movement: Orbital circling shot; slow-motion leap highlights; wide celebration framing

scenes.description: 拖拉机恢复运行，大家上车继续旅程，前往给小羊送甘草，途中欢声笑语，体现团队合作与友情。
scenes.video_prompt: The animals hop aboard the repaired tractor, waving goodbye to the site. The engine rumbles smoothly as they drive down the country road. Inside the cab, the fox drives proudly, surrounded by smiling friends. Cut to a distant shot showing the vehicle moving toward a green meadow where hungry lambs await. Dialogue bubbles convey excitement about delivering hay. Use gentle camera sway to simulate motion, with sunny skies and fluttering leaves enhancing warmth. Focus on camaraderie through shared glances and laughter. Animated textures remain consistent with earlier scenes.

style_elements.characters: Group of happy animal friends; relaxed postures; friendly interactions
style_elements.environment: Sunny rural road leading to pasture; green fields; peaceful setting
style_elements.visual_style: Cheerful 2D animation; smooth motion; idyllic countryside palette
style_elements.camera_movement: Following dolly shot; interior cab views; scenic wide angles

scenes.description: 抵达目的地，小羊们开心吃草，大家跳舞庆祝，结尾充满欢乐与满足感，日文旁白增添异国趣味。
scenes.video_prompt: The tractor arrives at a cozy farmyard where baby lambs rush to eat fresh hay. The team celebrates with a spontaneous dance—twirling, clapping, and hopping in rhythm. Japanese voiceover adds whimsical flair. Final wide shot captures the joyful circle under a golden sunset. Characters maintain consistent designs with glowing outlines for emphasis. Music swells with upbeat folk tune. End on a freeze-frame smile with text: 'Everyone together!' Use soft lens flare and warm gradients to enhance emotional closure.

style_elements.characters: Dancing animal characters; joyful choreography; expressive movements
style_elements.environment: Farmyard at sunset; feeding lambs; festive atmosphere
style_elements.visual_style: Vibrant 2D animation; celebratory lighting; whimsical typography
style_elements.camera_movement: Wide static shot; slow zoom-out; final freeze-frame
